THE WONDER WALK Dragonfly Capsule
Campaign June 2026
Swarovski x Ariana Grande Co-Creation

DRAGONFLY Shedding Light in Wings, Petrified Wood & Metamorphosis

A celebration of life’s cycles, designed in collaboration with Ariana Grande. Blending raw geological history with hyper-refined crystals, the centerpiece brooch and layered chokers contrast natural petrified wood with iridescent compound-cut stones.

Concept Display Setup
Dragonfly Brooch
Draped Choker
Compound Eye Faceting
Select hotspots on the display
Style Manifesto: Organic Metamorphosis Design Ethos

Metamorphosis in Aurora Borealis

The Dragonfly Capsule represents ultimate adaptation. Each wing features a custom gradient of multi-faceted crystals, catching light to shift from soft emerald to lavender, capturing the essence of dragonfly iridescence.

Contrast of the Ages

By placing the delicate, high-frequency crystal choker over raw petrified wood, the presentation honors the tension between deep geological time and the fleeting sparkle of a wingspan in light.

Signature Capsule Traits Custom compound-eye crystal faceting, iridescent aurora borealis stones, multi-layered liquid chain chokers, and raw timber wood visual displays.
Visual Merchandising Dragonfly x Ariana Grande
Metamorphosis
The Wonder Walk Training Guide Staff Script
Select coordinates (1, 2, or 3) on the display

Tap on any of the glittering numbered coordinate markers on the dragonfly display to load deep technical specs, storytelling narratives, or active guest hooks.

Key Storytelling Cue: "Metamorphosis & Metaphor"

"Invite your guest to look closely at the iridescent wings. Explain that the dragonfly represents transformation and the pursuit of lightness. It's not just jewelry—it is a wearable symbol of personal evolution."

Active Rehearsal Prompt: "The Textured Discovery"

  • Staff Action: Contrast the rough texture of the petrified wood display with the polished rhodium chains of the choker.
  • Engaging Question: "This piece links the organic history of the earth with precision cut crystals. Do you prefer the organic symbolism of the iridescent brooch, or the cascading, layered flow of the choker?"
Practiced your walk today?

Customer Persona Simulator (Dragonfly Walk)

Simulate store guest profiles to train your staff on the most effective storytelling angles for natural organic art.

The Avant-Garde Collector Loves Sculptural Design

This client favors unusual, nature-inspired luxury statements and is fascinated by texture, history, and sculptural visual merchandising setups.

Recommended Conversation Opener
"Notice how the raw, earthy textures of the petrified wood display elevate the precision of this liquid choker. It brings out the organic, living pulse of the crystals as if they are resting in a deep, ancient forest."
Crucial Selling Point: Contrast between industrial precision and geological history, bold structural placement, and organic art.

Post-Rehearsal Tip

Share success stories or styling cues that worked during your team's Dragonfly walkthrough. Help build a shared script database!

Recent Team Insights (Live Feedback Loop)

Dragonfly Walk Feed
Evelyn C. (Styling Expert) 30 mins ago

I love pointing out the compound-eye micro-faceting. Pointing flashlight beams from the side shows how the light refracts in hundreds of microscopic angles—guests are absolutely transfixed!

Nathan R. (Advisor Trainer) Yesterday

The petrified wood display is a massive conversation starter. It makes the crystals feel grounded in nature rather than just industrial. Essential selling script hook!
